bottom_line: Increase S12 integration-test gate timeout from 900s to 1800s; the full suite (1858 tests) cannot complete within 900s regardless of code changes.
coverage_notes: Sampled tail (last 200 lines) of S12_fix1.log (95KB); read S01, S02, S06_fix1 logs in full. S03_run2.log was sampled (107KB). S12 had 5 fix cycles; read cycles 1-2 fully, cycles 3-5 were structurally identical (same timeout hypothesis, same approach). DB telemetry: full (DB:UP).

findings.title: Integration-test gate timeout (900s) too short for 1858-test suite
findings.recommendation: Increase the S12 gate timeout from 900s to 1800s in the workflow manifest or quality gate config. Alternatively, add pytest -k filtering for items that only touch orch/ and dashboard/ to run a targeted subset. The agent cannot fix a gate timeout via code changes.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Increase S12 integration gate timeout from 900s to 1800s; analyzed in ai-dev/active/I-00072/reports/I-00072_self_assess_report.md. Target file: workflow manifest or QualityValidation_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Pre-existing E501 lint errors in test_f00055_workflow_fixture.py gate every QV run
findings.recommendation: Fix the two long lines (67, 69) in tests/integration/test_f00055_workflow_fixture.py by wrapping the assertion message in parentheses, as the S06 fix cycle demonstrated. Alternatively add the file to ruff's per-file-ignores in pyproject.toml.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00072_S06_fix1.log:52 — 'These lint errors are pre-existing in files not touched by I-00072. Let me fix them:'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Fix pre-existing E501 long-line violations in tests/integration/test_f00055_workflow_fixture.py (lines 67, 69) to stop polluting every item's S06 QV gate; analyzed in ai-dev/active/I-00072/reports/I-00072_self_assess_report.md. Target file: tests/integration/test_f00055_workflow_fixture.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: Forward-coverage decision for migration_rolled_back was undocumented in design template
findings.recommendation: Add a 'forward coverage' checkbox or note field to the Implementation_Prompt_Template.md so agents explicitly record when an enum value is added without a wired producer. This makes the audit trail visible for future reviewers.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00072/reports/I-00072_S01_Backend_report.md:54 — 'Added proactively even though no daemon producer exists yet — cost is zero, benefit is avoiding a future ticket'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add forward-coverage note field to Implementation_Prompt_Template.md so agents explicitly record when adding enum values without wired producers; analyzed in ai-dev/active/I-00072/reports/I-00072_self_assess_report.md. Target file: templates/design/Implementation_Prompt_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S03 required 2 runs — possible test collection non-determinism
findings.recommendation: Investigate tests/unit/test_merge_queue_cli.py for non-deterministic test ordering or fixture scope issues that caused S03 run1 to need a retry.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00072_S03_run2.log exists (107KB) indicating a second run
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate test collection non-determinism in tests/unit/test_merge_queue_cli.py causing S03 retries; analyzed in ai-dev/active/I-00072/reports/I-00072_self_assess_report.md. Target file: tests/unit/test_merge_queue_cli.py. Effort: M.
